data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Delivery status tracking' within the SMS Reminder System. However, the evidence does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate this functionality. The absence of such evidence indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage, as the necessary checks to confirm the implementation of delivery status tracking are missing.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of delivery status tracking.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the delivery status tracking requirement.
